title: Crispy Chicken Casserole
description: A flavorful and satisfying casserole dish that combines the crunch of crispy chicken with the rich flavors of a traditional casserole.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the crispy wonton strips and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, chicken broth, curry powder, brown sugar, and fish sauce to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked chicken back into the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the crispy wonton strips.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the wonton strips are golden brown.
